expectations.evidence: Has 'Core Function' section identifying 'one-to-many transformation' and 'Metaphor Exploration' with 7 metaphor domains before any candidates
All 7 candidates (Prism, Loom, Mold, Stencil, Kiln, Shuttle, Plate) are real English words
No candidates use Renderer, Builder, Platform, Hub, Cloud, Sync, Engine, Suite, or Assistant
Prism, Loom, and Stencil each have detailed evaluations explaining their metaphorical fit and tradeoffs
